General.Name: Budweiser Brewing Company
General.Description: Budweiser Brewing Company APAC Limited, an investment holding company, engages in brewing and distribution of beer in South Korea, Japan, New Zealand, China, India, Vietnam, and internationally. It brews, imports, markets, distributes, and sells a portfolio of beer brands, including Budweiser, Stella Artois, Corona, Harbin, Hoegaarden, and Cass. The company was founded in 1876 and is headquartered in Causeway Bay, Hong Kong. Budweiser Brewing Company APAC Limited operates as a subsidiary of AB InBev Brewing Company (APAC) Limited.
General.Address: Hysan Place, Causeway Bay, Hong Kong
